data.status: in the final stages of construction and inspections; opening in May
data.short_description: Market on Morehead is a full-service restaurant and bar opening in Charlotte in May 2026, positioned near the light rail's Carson Station with seating for 200 inside and 150 outdoors. The restaurant is a sister spot to Market on Main in Columbia, South Carolina, and features a 25-foot LED Jumbotron, a 40-seat bar, and Rail Trail patio views. Co-founder Josh Willoughby has worked for the past year to finalize the space.

data.location: Kerala, India (statewide; specific addresses not specified)
data.short_description: KHRA announced a statewide shutdown of hotels and restaurants on May 6 to protest a sharp increase in commercial LPG prices. The Centre raised the price of 19 kg commercial LPG cylinders by ₹993, pushing costs beyond ₹3,000 in the state. Industry representatives warned that menu prices may need to rise by 50–60% to sustain operations.

data.event_date: "This week" (relative to article date of May 4, 2026)
data.short_description: Chiappini's Gulf Station, a convenience store and gathering spot in Melrose, FL, is closing after 91 years in business as the third-generation owners, Mark and Robin Chiappini, retire. The store has operated since 1935 and served as a community hub with beer, bait, propane, and live music. No word was given on what will replace it.

data.location: 1250 Caroline St., Atlanta, GA 30307 (Edgewood Retail District)
data.event_date: Late summer 2026 (approximately four months from article date)
data.status: slated to open in late summer
data.short_description: Utah-based dessert franchise Crumbl is opening a 1,403-square-foot location at 1250 Caroline St. in Atlanta's Edgewood Retail District, operated by KTP Capital. This will be KTP Capital's second Crumbl location, joining an existing location in Toco Hills, and is positioned to serve high population density in the city.

data.location: Sugar Land Town Square, Sugar Land, TX (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Rainbow Cloudz has opened a second location in Sugar Land Town Square, selling plushies, Pokémon, Labubus, accessories, and other collectible items. The store also operates as a slime bar in partnership with Kawaii Slime Company and as a children's party venue. No reservation is required during store hours for walk-in slime bar access.

data.location: Lower Hill District, Pittsburgh, PA (full address not specified) — adjacent to PPG Paints Arena
data.short_description: Citizens Live at the Wylie is a new 4,000-capacity live music venue in Pittsburgh's Lower Hill District set to debut in fall 2026. Pittsburgh native Wiz Khalifa is set to headline the kickoff on October 2, with additional shows announced through January 2027. The venue features a general admission floor, balcony seating, a rooftop lounge, and premium hospitality areas.

data.location: 400 Mosaic Court, St. Joseph, MO (zip not specified)
data.event_date: Soft opening: April 20; Ribbon cutting: May 7; Grand Opening: May 9
data.short_description: The Rolling Hills Consolidated Library's new Riverside branch soft-opened April 20 after more than two years of planning and 18 months of construction. A ribbon-cutting is scheduled for May 7 and a grand opening on May 9, featuring an all-day open house with tours and giveaways. The 36,000-square-foot facility houses the library's largest branch, the Bookmobile office, Administration Office, and a used bookstore.

data.location: El Camino Promenade, Encinitas, CA (full address not specified — off El Camino Real and Via Molena)
data.status: slated to open; grand opening celebration May 14
data.short_description: Nordstrom Rack is opening a new 24,000-square-foot location at El Camino Promenade in Encinitas, with a grand opening celebration scheduled for May 14 at 9 a.m. The event will feature a DJ, light bites, gift card giveaways, and an Operation Warm charity shopping experience. The store is the off-price retail division of Nordstrom, offering up to 70% off apparel, accessories, beauty products, home decor, and shoes.

data.location: Miller Hill Mall, Fountain Court, Duluth, MN (full address not specified)
data.status: opening planned for this fall; construction already underway
data.short_description: Carter's, a children's apparel and accessories retailer, is opening a new location at Miller Hill Mall in Duluth, MN, with construction already underway and an opening planned for fall 2026. This will be the first dedicated Carter's location in the Duluth area, with the nearest current locations requiring a significant drive south. The mall expects the store to be open in time for the holiday shopping season.

The restaurant, owned by Frank LoPiccolo who also owns Frank's Italian Restaurant in the town of Maine, will feature indoor dining, an outdoor deck, and access from the Vestal Rail Trail. The grand opening was initially planned for January but was delayed.

data.location: Île de Bendor (private island off Bandol), Provence, France (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Zannier Île de Bendor, a 93-key hotel on a private island off Bandol in Provence, is now open following a five-year transformation. The property is a collaboration between Société Paul Ricard and Zannier Hotels, featuring three distinct accommodation styles across the island along with eight dining spaces, a wellness centre, kids' club, and diving centre. It marks the revival of the island, which was first developed by pastis pioneer Paul Ricard in 1950.

data.event_date: By end of May 2026 (first 90); further 100 by April 2027
data.status: set to close 90 charity shops by end of next month; a further 100 more to close by April 2027
data.short_description: Cancer Research UK is closing 90 charity shops by the end of May 2026, with a further 100 closing by April 2027, citing rising costs and changing shopping habits. Shops in Birmingham, Bolton, Lancaster, and Swindon are among those being axed, as the charity plans to reduce its total shop count to 320 high-performing locations. The article also references closures by six additional unnamed chains in May 2026 but provides no further business-specific details.

data.short_description: Sheetz is opening its new Fraser, MI gas station and convenience store on May 8, 2026, with a ribbon-cutting ceremony and giveaways from 9–11 a.m. The site incorporates pieces from the former State Bank of Fraser building facade and will be open 24 hours. data.short_description: Lotte Department Store announced it will open a Chloisu flagship store on the third floor of Avenuel at its main branch, marking the first such opening by a retailer in Korea. Chloisu is a brand of traditional Korean chilbo jewelry founded by master artisan Lee Soo-kyung, featuring around 30 art pieces and jewelry items including the signature work "Fantasia." The store is the only offline retail location for Chloisu products outside of the brand's gallery at its Ulsan headquarters.

data.location: Idaho Falls, ID (full address not specified)
data.short_description: The Shilo Inn in Idaho Falls was closed by U.S. Bankruptcy Court after Shilo Management Corporation's Chapter 11 bankruptcy case was converted to Chapter 7, requiring liquidation of all assets. Fewer than 15 hotel employees lost their jobs as a result of the closure, with the hotel's chain-locked lobby preventing public access.

data.status: will close on or before June 1
data.short_description: Nellie's Southern Kitchen, the restaurant from the Jonas Brothers and family, will close on or before June 1 at the MGM Grand on the Las Vegas Strip, as its Vegas lease approaches the end. The restaurant opened in June 2022 as an outpost of the North Carolina original, celebrating the recipes of Grandma Nellie. The closure was reported by TheStreet.com, citing an email from the brand indicating it was directing its efforts elsewhere.

data.location: 830 Aliceanna St., Harbor East, Baltimore, MD (zip not specified)
data.status: plans to open its first Maryland showroom this fall
data.short_description: Los Angeles-based furniture retailer 7th Avenue plans to open its first Maryland showroom this fall in Baltimore's Harbor East neighborhood at 830 Aliceanna St. The 1,028-square-foot showroom will be the brand's first location in Maryland, joining retailers such as Alo Yoga, Patagonia, Chanel Beauty, and Saatva at Harbor East. The retailer is known for its modular sofas and sectionals with water-repellent, stain-resistant fabrics.

data.short_description: Hyundai Department Store plans to open a flagship store in Omotesando, Japan within the first half of 2026, building on an existing regular store it already operates in Japan.

data.location: New Ross, Co. Wexford, Ireland (full address not specified — described as just arms length from main premises)
data.status: expanding to a second, separate location
data.short_description: Award-winning restaurant Bearú is expanding to a second, separate location in New Ross, Co. Wexford, near its main premises, to showcase the talents of recently crowned Best Pastry Chef in Leinster, Claire Griffin. The article does not provide an opening date or full address for the new location.

data.location: Near East Louetta and Lexington roads, Spring, TX (full address not specified)
data.status: now open; grand opening event held April 25
data.short_description: Haus of Innergy, a locally owned fitness studio specializing in group classes, is now open near East Louetta and Lexington roads in Spring, TX, with a grand opening event held on April 25. The studio is owned and operated by Shelita White-Russ, a certified spin instructor.

data.status: retiring from the restaurant business effective May 10, 2026
data.short_description: The Crack'd Egg restaurant in Brentwood, PA is closing permanently on May 10, 2026, with the owners citing unsustainable costs and personal health and family pressures as reasons for retirement from the restaurant business. The owners announced a going-out-of-business sale with "everything must go."

data.location: 91 Morris St., Morristown, NJ (zip not specified)
data.event_date: Last month (relative to article date of May 4, 2026)
data.short_description: Sabores Latinos opened in Morristown, NJ, run by the same owners as Chef Freddy's Table, serving traditional Latin American dishes including fajitas, pupusas, and baleadas, along with burgers, ribs, seafood, and breakfast.

data.location: 2311 Route 206, Belle Mead, NJ (zip not specified) — formerly Mango Tree
data.event_date: Friday (relative to article date of May 4, 2026)
data.short_description: Srirangam-Veg Restaurant, formerly Mango Tree, held its grand opening in Belle Mead, NJ, serving vegetarian North and South Indian food including dosas, vadas, and fresh coffee.

data.location: 485 Marin Drive, Jersey City, NJ (zip not specified) — former KRE leasing office
data.short_description: The first New Jersey location of Uni Uni Bubble Tea opened in mid-April in Jersey City, in the former leasing office of residential developer KRE. The menu features more than 40 drinks and snacks with 19 toppings, and the space offers WiFi and electrical outlets for residents who use it for meetings and work.

data.location: 1882 Goose Creek Road SW Unit 1, Ocean Isle Beach, NC 28469
data.event_date: "Next couple of weeks" (relative to article date of May 3, 2026)
data.status: targeting an opening in the next couple of weeks
data.short_description: Waterway Tavern is preparing to open in the clubhouse at 1882 Goose Creek Road SW, Unit 1 in Ocean Isle Beach, NC, with owner Brittany Bowers targeting an opening in the next couple of weeks.
Toast is a new full-service restaurant and bar from owner Kristen Wallace-Williams at 120 Barnhardt Street in Greensboro, NC, targeting a May 1 opening while currently in hiring and onboarding.

data.event_date: "Next week" (relative to article date of May 3, 2026; pending final fire and health inspections)
data.status: targeting a soft opening next week, pending final fire and health inspections
data.short_description: Peak Pizza Bar is preparing to open at 2968 Old Cullowhee Road in Cullowhee, NC, targeting a soft opening the week of May 3, 2026, pending final fire and health inspections. The fast-casual, counter-service restaurant will focus on New York-style pizza.

Good Times Lounge, a cocktail-focused concept from owner Kristen Wallace-Williams, is targeting a June opening at 300 N College St in Charlotte's Uptown neighborhood. The concept will bring an upscale nightlife experience to the area.

data.location: 4905 Ashley Park Lane, Charlotte, NC 28210 — SouthPark
data.event_date: Late summer to early fall 2026 (exact date not specified)
data.status: targeting a late summer to early fall opening
data.short_description: Miró Spanish Grille is planning a second location at 4905 Ashley Park Lane in Charlotte's SouthPark area, targeting a late summer to early fall opening, per co-owner Felipe Alvarez. The new location will build on the brand's nearly three-decade presence in the market with an updated design and expanded experience.
